rows.description: Comptroller Home Ricton Coll Parr Rectory a 2 Do Novr 1795 al-under Liem 2eouldtham 1796
rows.notes: Title/header row with date references. Handwriting is cursive and somewhat difficult; this appears to be a page heading rather than a transaction. Reads as a title for the accounts that follow.
Section header introducing the list of arrears received. Clear handwriting. No amounts on this line — it is a structural label introducing the group of entries below.
Clear entry with legible description and amounts. Column alignment unambiguous. Shillings (17) and pence (0) both within valid range. Amounts read as 152.17.0.
